tasks.title: Design IndexedDB schema and Dexie.js models for all user data types
tasks.description: Create a new database schema using Dexie.js in src/services/storage/Database.ts that includes tables for IELTS topics, vocabulary words, example sentences, grammar notes, reading passages, listening transcripts, writing prompts, speaking questions, mistakes, study notes, daily learning tasks, custom study plans, useful phrases, AI-generated content, and personal progress records. Define appropriate fields, indexes, and relationships. Add versioning and migration support for future schema changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Database schema covers all required user data types
Versioning and migration logic is implemented
Dexie.js models are defined with indexes for search and filtering
tasks.expectedResult: A fully defined Dexie.js database schema with tables and versioning ready for use in the app

outputPlan.description: Dexie.js database schema and models for user data

metadata.inputContext: Project existing storage service and user data requirements
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the core local database schema and models for user data persistence

tasks.title: Implement CRUD operations and data validation in DatabaseService
tasks.description: Extend src/services/storage/Database.ts to implement create, read, update, delete (CRUD) methods for each user data type. Add validation logic to ensure data integrity on add/update. Implement error handling to prevent app crashes from corrupted or invalid data. Include methods for tagging, marking favorites, difficulty, learned status, and review flags. Ensure all operations persist data in IndexedDB and survive page reloads.
acceptanceCriteria: CRUD methods exist for all user data types
Data validation prevents invalid data insertion
Error handling prevents app crashes on corrupted data
Tagging and status marking supported
tasks.expectedResult: DatabaseService fully supports safe CRUD operations with validation and tagging

outputPlan.description: CRUD methods and validation logic for user data

metadata.inputContext: Dexie.js schema and models from previous task
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables safe and robust data manipulation in the local database

tasks.title: Create Data Management page UI in src/pages/Settings/DataManagement.tsx
tasks.description: Implement a new Data Management page component under src/pages/Settings/DataManagement.tsx. This page provides UI for exporting backup JSON, importing backup JSON with merge and replace modes, and resetting all data with confirmation dialogs. Show import summary with counts of added, updated, skipped, and failed records. Display clear error messages on import/export failures. Include buttons for Export Backup, Import Backup, and Reset Data. Use toast notifications for user feedback on all actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Data Management page UI is accessible from Settings
Export and Import backup buttons function correctly
Reset data button clears all user data after confirmation
Import summary and error messages display properly
Toast notifications appear after all data actions
tasks.expectedResult: Fully functional Data Management page with import/export/reset features and user feedback

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides user interface for managing local user data backups and resets

tasks.title: Add import/export JSON backup logic with versioning and partial import support
tasks.description: Implement functions in src/services/storage/Database.ts to export all user data as a versioned JSON backup file and import from such files. Support partial import by feature type, with options for merge mode (add new data) and replace mode (clear existing data before import). Validate imported data before saving, skip invalid entries, and generate import summary with counts of added, updated, skipped, and failed records. Show confirmation dialog before replace mode import. Handle corrupted or incompatible backup files gracefully with error messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Exported backup JSON includes version metadata
Import supports merge and replace modes
Partial import by feature type is possible
Invalid or corrupted data is skipped with error messages
Import summary is generated and displayed
tasks.expectedResult: Robust import/export backup functionality with versioning and partial import

outputPlan.description: Import/export backup functions with validation and versioning

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables users to backup and restore their local data safely and flexibly

tasks.title: Integrate Data Management page into Settings navigation
tasks.description: Modify src/pages/Settings/index.tsx or equivalent to add a navigation link or menu item to the new Data Management page. Ensure the link is clearly labeled and accessible on desktop and mobile. Verify navigation works correctly and the Data Management page loads without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Data Management page is reachable from Settings navigation
Navigation works on desktop and mobile
No errors occur when loading the page
tasks.expectedResult: Users can access Data Management page from Settings menu

outputPlan.description: Add navigation link to Data Management page

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Allows users to easily find and use the data management features

tasks.title: Add search, filter, tag, and status marking UI to feature pages
tasks.description: Modify existing feature pages (e.g., vocabulary, reading passages, grammar notes) to add UI controls for searching, filtering by topic, skill, difficulty, or status, tagging data entries, and marking entries as favorite, difficult, learned, or needs review. Use the DatabaseService tagging and status fields. Ensure UI is mobile-friendly and performant with large data sets.
acceptanceCriteria: Search input filters displayed data in real time
Filter controls allow filtering by topic, skill, difficulty, status
Tagging UI allows adding/removing tags on entries
Status marking UI supports favorite, difficult, learned, needs review
UI is responsive and mobile-friendly
tasks.expectedResult: Feature pages support advanced data filtering, tagging, and status marking

outputPlan.description: Add search, filter, tag, and status UI
Add search, filter, tag, and status UI

evidence: Feature pages modified with search and filter UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user ability to manage and find their learning data

tasks.title: Add forms for adding and editing user data with autosave support
tasks.description: Implement or enhance forms on feature pages for adding and editing user data entries (e.g., vocabulary words, grammar notes, study notes). Forms must be simple, fast, and mobile-friendly. Add autosave functionality for fields like writing drafts and notes to save progress automatically to IndexedDB. Use toast notifications to confirm saves and updates. Validate input data before saving.
acceptanceCriteria: Forms allow adding and editing all user data types
Autosave triggers on field changes with debounce
Toast notifications appear on save/update
Input validation prevents invalid data submission
Forms are mobile-friendly and performant
tasks.expectedResult: User can add/edit data with autosave and validation on all relevant feature pages

outputPlan.description: Add/edit forms with autosave for writing prompts
Add/edit forms with autosave for study notes

evidence: Forms modified with autosave and validation
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables smooth user data entry and editing with autosave

tasks.title: Implement toast notification system for data actions
tasks.description: Add or enhance a toast notification system in the app to show user feedback after save, update, delete, import, and export actions related to user data. Notifications should be brief, dismissible, and accessible. Integrate this system with DatabaseService and UI components handling data operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Toast notifications appear after all data actions
Notifications are dismissible and accessible
Notifications do not block UI interaction
tasks.expectedResult: User receives clear toast feedback on all data operations

metadata.inputContext: Data operation events from DatabaseService and UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user experience with clear feedback on data changes

tasks.title: Add friendly empty states encouraging user data input
tasks.description: Add friendly and informative empty state UI components or messages on all feature pages when no user data exists. Encourage users to add their own learning material. Include quick action buttons or links to add new data. Ensure empty states are visually appealing and mobile-friendly.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty states appear when no data is present
Messages encourage user data input
Quick action buttons to add data are present
Empty states are mobile-friendly
tasks.expectedResult: Users see helpful empty states prompting data entry on empty feature pages

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Encourages users to add and manage their own learning data

tasks.title: Add localStorage usage for small user settings only
tasks.description: Implement or verify that small user settings (e.g., UI preferences, last opened page) are stored in localStorage only, not in IndexedDB. Ensure separation of concerns between large user data in IndexedDB and small settings in localStorage. Add utility functions for localStorage get/set with error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Small user settings stored in localStorage
Large user data stored only in IndexedDB
Utility functions handle localStorage errors gracefully
tasks.expectedResult: Small user settings persist in localStorage separate from IndexedDB data

outputPlan.description: Utility functions for localStorage user settings

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures proper storage separation for small user settings

tasks.title: Add database migration tests and corrupted data recovery handling
tasks.description: Create automated tests in src/tests/storage/DatabaseMigration.test.ts to verify database versioning and migration logic works correctly. Simulate corrupted or incompatible local data and verify the app handles it gracefully without crashing. Add recovery or reset logic to allow users to recover from corrupted data states with clear error messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration tests cover all version upgrades
App does not crash on corrupted local data
Recovery/reset logic works and shows clear errors
tasks.expectedResult: Database migrations are tested and corrupted data handled safely

outputPlan.description: Tests for database versioning, migration, and corrupted data handling

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures data integrity and app stability across database versions
